required_preferences.fact: Embraces spontaneous calls and video chats from her boyfriend while he is visiting Lyon — schedules only with family, but answers boyfriend's calls anytime

supersedes.fact: Screens all phone calls from family and boyfriend; only answers during scheduled video sessions — never takes spontaneous calls

required_preferences.fact: Now prefers immersive English practice with the French family's children at their countryside home on weekends — no longer restricts sessions to public parks in Lyon

supersedes.fact: Always arranges meetups with the French family’s children at public parks for English practice — never invites them to her dorm

required_preferences.fact: Explores a new Lyon neighborhood every Saturday by walking tours — never repeats the same route twice
Reads French-language novels borrowed from the university library — never reads in English during her stay
Attends local art exhibitions twice a month with friends — never goes alone or to large commercial galleries
Uses guided meditation apps every morning to manage anxiety and replace her usual outdoor exercise routine

persona: An exchange student living abroad for a semester
